---
title: "Modeling Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

I have produced a data set containing ball by ball information for 1960 women's T20 internationals.

```{r Summary of our Data set}
summary(wt20)
```

Selecting some good variables for pairs:

```{r}
cts_data <- data.frame(wt20$date, wt20$win_by_runs, wt20$target, wt20$current_run_rate, wt20$required_run_rate)

pairs(cts_data)
```

- We can see some <!-- R Notebook saved outputs: do not edit
  RNOTEBOOK_RMD_STATE_BEGIN
  eyJ2ZXJzaW9uIjoyLCJjb2RlQ2VsbFN0YXRlcyI6W3siZmluZ2VycHJpbnQiOiJ7XCJsYW5ndWFnZVwiOlwiclwiLFwiY29kZVwi
  Olwic3VtbWFyeSh3dDIwKVxcclwiLFwib3B0aW9uc1wiOntcImxhYmVsXCI6XCJTdW1tYXJ5IG9mIG91ciBEYXRhIHNldFwifX0i
  LCJyZXN1bHQiOnsidHlwZSI6InJlc3VsdCIsImNodW5rX2lkIjoibmItMiIsInNvdXJjZV9jb2RlIjoic3VtbWFyeSh3dDIwKVxy
  XG4iLCJjb25zb2xlX3NlZ21lbnRzIjpbXSwiY29uc29sZSI6IiIsInN0ZG91dCI6IiIsInN0ZGVyciI6IiIsInBsb3RzIjpbXSwi
  cGxvdHNfaHRtbCI6W10sImRhdGFmcmFtZXMiOltdLCJvdXRwdXRfb3JkZXIiOltdLCJlcnJvciI6IndyaXRlIEVQSVBFIn19LHsi
  ZmluZ2VycHJpbnQiOiJ7XCJsYW5ndWFnZVwiOlwiclwiLFwiY29kZVwiOlwiY3RzX2RhdGEgPC0gZGF0YS5mcmFtZSh3dDIwJGRh
  dGUsIHd0MjAkd2luX2J5X3J1bnMsIHd0MjAkdGFyZ2V0LCB3dDIwJGN1cnJlbnRfcnVuX3JhdGUsIHd0MjAkcmVxdWlyZWRfcnVu
  X3JhdGUpXFxyXFxuXFxyXFxucGFpcnMoY3RzX2RhdGEpXFxyXCIsXCJvcHRpb25zXCI6e319IiwicmVzdWx0IjpudWxsfV0sImNv
  ZGVDZWxsUmVzdWx0cyI6W119
  RNOTEBOOK_RMD_STATE_END
  -->
